web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:const PrescriptionPrintTemplate = forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, PrescriptionPrintTemplateProps>(({ encounterId, onReady }, ref) => {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:  const { selectedClinic } = useAppStore();
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:  const [mergedPrescriptions, setMergedPrescriptions] = useState<Prescription[]>([]);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:  const [data, setData] = useState<{
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:    patient: Patient;
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:    encounter: Encounter;
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:    vitals: VitalsRecord | null;
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:    diagnosis: DiagnosisRecord | null;
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:    prescription: PrescriptionRecord | null;
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:  } | null>(null);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:    const fetchData = async () => {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      try {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        setLoading(true);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        const encounter = await getEncounterById(encounterId);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        if (!encounter) throw new Error("Encounter not found");
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        const [patient, vitals, diagnosis, prescription] = await Promise.all([
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          getPatientById(encounter.patient_id),
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          getVitalsByEncounter(encounterId),
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          getDiagnosisByEncounter(encounterId),
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          getPrescriptionByEncounter(encounterId)
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        ]);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        // Fetch all historical prescriptions to satisfy the "RX history" requirement
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        const q = query(
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          collection(db, "prescriptions"),
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          where("patient_id", "==", encounter.patient_id),
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          orderBy("created_at", "desc")
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        );
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        const allHistQuery = await getDocs(q);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        const allHistRecords = allHistQuery.docs.map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() } as PrescriptionRecord));
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        // Logic: Show prescriptions from current session OR those that were dispensed today (even if from past visits)
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        const currentPresMeds = prescription?.prescriptions || [];
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        const dispensedMedsToday = prescription?.dispensation_details || [];
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        const dispensedNames = new Set(dispensedMedsToday.map((d: any) => d.medication));
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        // Find initial Rx details for anything dispensed today that isn't already in the current prescribed list
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        const historicalRequired: Prescription[] = [];
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        dispensedNames.forEach(name => {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          // If it's already in the current prescription, skip
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          if (currentPresMeds.some(m => m.medicationName === name)) return;
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          // Otherwise, find the LATEST instructions for this drug in history
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          for (const record of allHistRecords) {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:            const match = record.prescriptions.find(p => p.medicationName === name);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:            if (match) {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:              historicalRequired.push(match);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:              break; // Found latest instructions
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:            }
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          }
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        });
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        setMergedPrescriptions([...currentPresMeds, ...historicalRequired]);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        setData({ patient, encounter, vitals, diagnosis, prescription });
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        setLoading(false);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        if (onReady) onReady();
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      } catch (err: any) {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        console.error("Print Data Fetch Error:", err);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        setError(err.message);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        setLoading(false);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      }
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:    };
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:

web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:  const formattedDate = (ts: any) => {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:    // Robust Fallback: default to new Date().toLocaleDateString() and new Date().toLocaleTimeString()
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:    if (!ts) {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      const now = new Date();
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      return `${now.toLocaleDateString()} ${now.toLocaleTimeString()}`;
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:    }
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:    try {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      // 1. Native dayjs/Date
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      if (dayjs.isDayjs(ts)) return ts.format('DD MMM YYYY, hh:mm A');
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      if (ts instanceof Date) return dayjs(ts).format('DD MMM YYYY, hh:mm A');
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      // 2. Specialized parsing
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      let date: Date | null = null;
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      if (ts && typeof ts === 'object') {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        if (typeof ts.toDate === 'function') {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          date = ts.toDate();
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        } else if (typeof ts.toMillis === 'function') {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          date = new Date(ts.toMillis());
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        } else if (ts.seconds !== undefined) {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          date = new Date(ts.seconds * 1000);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        } else if (ts._seconds !== undefined) {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          date = new Date(ts._seconds * 1000);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        } else if (ts.seconds_ !== undefined) { // Common in some serialization
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:          date = new Date(ts.seconds_ * 1000);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        }
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      } else if (typeof ts === 'number') {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        date = new Date(ts);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      } else if (typeof ts === 'string') {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        const d = new Date(ts);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        if (!isNaN(d.getTime())) date = d;
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      }
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      if (date && !isNaN(date.getTime())) {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        return dayjs(date).format('DD MMM YYYY, hh:mm A');
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      }
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      // 3. Fallback to general dayjs
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      const parsed = dayjs(ts);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      if (parsed.isValid() && parsed.year() > 1900) {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:        return parsed.format('DD MMM YYYY, hh:mm A');
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      }
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      // Final Failover: Use current local time to avoid dash (-)
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      const now = new Date();
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      return `${now.toLocaleDateString()} ${now.toLocaleTimeString()}`;
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:    } catch (e) {
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      console.error("Format Date Error:", e, ts);
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      const now = new Date();
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:      return `${now.toLocaleDateString()} ${now.toLocaleTimeString()}`;
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:    }
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:  };
web/src/components/PrescriptionPrintTemplate.tsx:

web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:  // 2. Triage Color System (Global Clinical Standard)
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:  const getTriageStyle = (level: string) => {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:    switch (level?.toLowerCase()) {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      case 'emergency': 
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        return { bg: '#ef4444', text: '#fff', border: '2px solid #b91c1c', label: 'EMERGENCY' }; 
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      case 'urgent': 
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        return { bg: '#f59e0b', text: '#fff', border: '2px solid #d97706', label: 'URGENT' };
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      case 'standard': 
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        return { bg: '#10b981', text: '#fff', border: '2px solid #059669', label: 'STANDARD' };
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      default: 
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        return { bg: '#94a3b8', text: '#fff', border: '1px solid #64748b', label: 'PENDING' };
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:    }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:  };
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:  const triage = getTriageStyle(selectedPatient.triage_level || 'standard');
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:  const vitals = selectedPatient.currentVitals;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:  // 3. Highest Alert Color System (Halo)
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:  const getHighestAlertColor = () => {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:    const colors = {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      RED: '#ef4444',
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      YELLOW: '#f59e0b',
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      GREEN: '#10b981',
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      GRAY: '#94a3b8'
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:    };
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:    let highestPriority = 0; // 0: Gray, 1: Green, 2: Yellow, 3: Red
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:    let finalColor = colors.GRAY;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:    const updatePriority = (color: string) => {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      let p = 0;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      if (color === colors.RED || color === '#f43f5e') p = 3;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      else if (color === colors.YELLOW) p = 2;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      else if (color === colors.GREEN) p = 1;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      if (p > highestPriority) {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        highestPriority = p;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        finalColor = color;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:    };
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:    // Factor: Triage Level
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:    updatePriority(triage.bg);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:    if (vitals) {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      // Helper to get age in years
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      const getAgeYears = () => {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        let years = selectedPatient.age_years;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        if (selectedPatient.date_of_birth) {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:          const regex = /^(\d{2})\/(\d{2})\/(\d{4})$/;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:          if (regex.test(selectedPatient.date_of_birth)) {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:            const [_, day, month, year] = selectedPatient.date_of_birth.match(regex)!;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:            const birthDate = new Date(parseInt(year, 10), parseInt(month, 10) - 1, parseInt(day, 10));
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:            const today = new Date();
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:            years = today.getFullYear() - birthDate.getFullYear();
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:            const m = today.getMonth() - birthDate.getMonth();
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:            if (m < 0 || (m === 0 && today.getDate() < birthDate.getDate())) years--;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:          }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        } else if (selectedPatient.estimated_birth_year) {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:          years = new Date().getFullYear() - selectedPatient.estimated_birth_year;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        return years ?? 0;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      };
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      const age = getAgeYears();
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      // Factor: BP
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      const s = vitals.systolic_2 || vitals.systolic;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      const d = vitals.diastolic_2 || vitals.diastolic;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      if (s >= 180 || d >= 120) updatePriority(colors.RED);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      else if (s >= 130 || d >= 80) updatePriority(colors.YELLOW);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      else if (s > 0) updatePriority(colors.GREEN);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      // Factor: HR
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      if (vitals.heartRate > 0) {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        let hrLow = 60, hrHigh = 100;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        if (age < 1) { hrLow = 100; hrHigh = 160; }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        else if (age <= 2) { hrLow = 98; hrHigh = 140; }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        else if (age <= 5) { hrLow = 80; hrHigh = 120; }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        else if (age <= 12) { hrLow = 75; hrHigh = 110; }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        if (vitals.heartRate > hrHigh || vitals.heartRate < hrLow) updatePriority(colors.RED);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        else if (vitals.heartRate > (hrHigh - 5) || vitals.heartRate < (hrLow + 5)) updatePriority(colors.YELLOW);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        else updatePriority(colors.GREEN);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      // Factor: RR
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      if (vitals.respiratoryRate > 0) {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        let rrLow = 12, rrHigh = 20;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        if (age < 1) { rrLow = 30; rrHigh = 60; }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        else if (age <= 12) { rrLow = 18; rrHigh = 30; }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        if (vitals.respiratoryRate > rrHigh || vitals.respiratoryRate < rrLow) updatePriority(colors.RED);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        else if (vitals.respiratoryRate > (rrHigh - 2) || vitals.respiratoryRate < (rrLow + 2)) updatePriority(colors.YELLOW);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        else updatePriority(colors.GREEN);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      // Factor: SpO2
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      if (vitals.oxygenSaturation > 0) {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        if (vitals.oxygenSaturation < 90) updatePriority(colors.RED);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        else if (vitals.oxygenSaturation <= 92) updatePriority(colors.YELLOW);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        else updatePriority(colors.GREEN);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      // Factor: BMI
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      if (vitals.bmi_class === 'Obese' || vitals.bmi_class === 'Underweight') updatePriority(colors.RED);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      else if (vitals.bmi_class === 'Overweight') updatePriority(colors.YELLOW);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      else if (vitals.bmi > 0) updatePriority(colors.GREEN);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      // Factor: MUAC
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      if (vitals.muac_class === 'Severely Malnourished') updatePriority(colors.RED);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      else if (vitals.muac_class === 'Moderately Malnourished') updatePriority(colors.YELLOW);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      else if (vitals.muac > 0) updatePriority(colors.GREEN);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      // Factor: Glucose (FBG/RBG)
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      if (vitals.fbg >= 126 || vitals.rbg >= 200) updatePriority(colors.RED);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      else if (vitals.fbg >= 100 || vitals.rbg >= 140) updatePriority(colors.YELLOW);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      else if (vitals.fbg > 0 || vitals.rbg > 0) updatePriority(colors.GREEN);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      // Factor: Hemoglobin
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      if (vitals.hemoglobin > 0) {
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        if (vitals.hemoglobin < 7) updatePriority(colors.RED);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        else if (vitals.hemoglobin < 11) updatePriority(colors.YELLOW); // Simplified threshold for halo
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        else updatePriority(colors.GREEN);
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      // CRITICAL: Nurse Override takes absolute precedence if set

web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:        return overrideStyle.bg;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:      }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:    }
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:    return finalColor;
web/src/components/PatientContextBar.tsx:  };

web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:const OperationalThroughput: React.FC<OperationalThroughputProps> = ({ summaries }) => {
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:  // Aggregate wait times
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:  const avgWaitTimes = React.useMemo(() => {
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    if (summaries.length === 0) return null;
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    const totals = { reg: 0, vitals: 0, doc: 0 };
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    summaries.forEach(s => {
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:      totals.reg += s.avg_wait_times?.reg_to_vitals || 0;
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:      totals.vitals += s.avg_wait_times?.vitals_to_doc || 0;
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:      totals.doc += s.avg_wait_times?.doc_to_pharmacy || 0;
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    });
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    return {
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:      reg: totals.reg / summaries.length,
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:      vitals: totals.vitals / summaries.length,
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:      doc: totals.doc / summaries.length
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    };
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:  }, [summaries]);
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:  // Color Intensity Scale (0 to 60 mins)
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:  const getIntensityColor = (minutes: number) => {
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    if (minutes < 15) return '#f0fdf4'; // Light green
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    if (minutes < 30) return '#fefce8'; // Light yellow
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    if (minutes < 45) return '#fff7ed'; // Light orange
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    return '#fef2f2'; // Light red
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:  };
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:  const getBorderColor = (minutes: number) => {
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    if (minutes < 15) return '#166534';
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    if (minutes < 30) return '#ca8a04';
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    if (minutes < 45) return '#ea580c';
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    return '#991b1b';
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:  };
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:  return (

web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:      title="OPERATIONAL THROUGHPUT HEATMAP" 
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:      subtitle="AVG WAIT TIMES BETWEEN CLINICAL STATIONS (MINUTES)"
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:      description="This operational heatmap tracks the average waiting duration for patients as they move through different clinical touchpoints (Registration to Pharmacy). It is a key KPI for measuring clinic efficiency and identification of staffing gaps or process bottlenecks."
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:    >

web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:            value={avgWaitTimes?.reg} 
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:            color={getIntensityColor(avgWaitTimes?.reg || 0)}

web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:          />
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:        </Grid>
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:        <Grid size={{ xs: 12, md: 4 }}>

web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:          />
web/src/components/analytics/OperationalThroughput.tsx:        </Grid>

web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:  const compressImage = (file: File | Blob): Promise<Blob> => {
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {

web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:      img.onload = () => {

web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        let width = img.width;
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        let height = img.height;
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        // Max dimensions: 1024px
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        const MAX_SIZE = 1024;
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        if (width > height) {
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:          if (width > MAX_SIZE) {
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            height *= MAX_SIZE / width;
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            width = MAX_SIZE;
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:          }
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        } else {
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:          if (height > MAX_SIZE) {
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            width *= MAX_SIZE / height;
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            height = MAX_SIZE;
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:          }
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        }
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        canvas.width = width;
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        canvas.height = height;
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        if (!ctx) {
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:          reject(new Error("Failed to get canvas context"));
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:          return;
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        }
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        canvas.toBlob(
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:          (blob) => {
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            if (blob) {
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:              resolve(blob);
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            } else {
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:              reject(new Error("Compression failed"));
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            }
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:          },
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:          'image/jpeg',
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:          0.7 // Quality: 0.7

web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:    // Path: patient_photos/{country}/{clinicId}/{patientId}/photo.jpg

web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:    const storageRef = ref(storage, path);
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:    const uploadTask = uploadBytesResumable(storageRef, blob);
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:    uploadTask.on(
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:      'state_changed',

web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        setProgress(p);
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:      },
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:      async (err) => {
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        console.error("Upload failed:", err);
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        // Offline resilience
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        if (!navigator.onLine || err.code === 'storage/retry-limit-exceeded' || err.code === 'storage/unauthorized') {
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:          try {
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            const db_idb = await getDB();
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            await db_idb.put(STORE_NAME, { patientId, blob, timestamp: Date.now() });
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            setOfflineMessage("Photo saved locally. Will upload when connection resumes.");
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            setState('idle');
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:          } catch (idbErr) {
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            console.error("Failed to save to IndexedDB:", idbErr);
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            setError("Upload failed and could not save locally.");
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:            setState('error');
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:          }
web/src/components/PatientPhotoCapture.tsx:        } else {

web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:const StationSearchHeader: React.FC<StationSearchHeaderProps> = ({ 
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:  stationStatus, 
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:  onPatientFound,

web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:  const [options, setOptions] = useState<Patient[]>([]);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('');
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:  const [qrOpen, setQrOpen] = useState(false);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:  const { notify, selectedClinic } = useAppStore();
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:  const { selectedCountry } = getSession();
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:  // Search logic
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:    if (inputValue.length < 2) {
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:      setOptions([]);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:      setHighlightedPatientIds([]);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:      return;
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:    }
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:    const delayDebounceFn = setTimeout(async () => {
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:      setLoading(true);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:      try {
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:        // Determine search params based on input
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:        const params: any = {};
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:        if (/^\d+$/.test(inputValue)) {
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:          // Likely an ID or phone
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:          params.national_id = inputValue;
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:          params.phone = inputValue;
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:          params.rohingya_number = inputValue;
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:          params.nepal_id = inputValue;
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:        } else {
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:          // Likely a name
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:          const parts = inputValue.split(' ');
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:          params.given_name = parts[0];
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:          if (parts.length > 1) params.family_name = parts[1];
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:        }
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:        const results = await searchPatients(params);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:        setOptions(results);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:        // Highlight matching patients in the current queue
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:        const matchingIds = results
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:          .filter(p => waitingList.some(item => item.patient_id === p.id))
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:          .map(p => p.id);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:        setHighlightedPatientIds(matchingIds);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:      } catch (error) {
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:        console.error("Search error:", error);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:      } finally {
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:        setLoading(false);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:      }
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:    }, 500);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:    return () => clearTimeout(delayDebounceFn);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:  }, [inputValue, waitingList]);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:  const handleSelectPatient = async (patient: Patient) => {
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:    // 1. Check if patient is already in the current queue
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:    const existingQueueItem = waitingList.find(item => item.patient_id === patient.id);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:    
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:    if (existingQueueItem) {
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:      // Just keep the highlight by setting the input value to the name
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:      setInputValue(`${patient.given_name} ${patient.family_name}`);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:      setOpen(false);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:      setQrOpen(false);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:      return;
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:    }
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:    // 2. If not in queue, add them
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:    setLoading(true);
web/src/components/StationSearchHeader.tsx:    try {

web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:
web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:  public render() {

web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:      let isFirestoreError = false;
web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:
web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:      try {
web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:        if (this.state.error?.message) {

web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:          if (parsed.error && parsed.operationType) {
web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:            errorMessage = `Firestore Error: ${parsed.error}`;
web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:            isFirestoreError = true;
web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:          }
web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:        }
web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:      } catch (e) {

web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:      }
web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:
web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:      return (
web/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx:        <div style={{

web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:const ClinicalSidebar: React.FC = () => {
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:  const { selectedPatient } = useAppStore();
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:  const location = useLocation();
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:  const [lastVisit, setLastVisit] = useState<Encounter | null>(null);
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:  const [lastVitals, setLastVitals] = useState<VitalsRecord | null>(null);
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:  const isAnthropometryPage = location.pathname.includes('vitals-1');
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:    const fetchHistory = async () => {
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:      if (!selectedPatient?.id) return;
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:      setLoading(true);
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:      try {
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:        const encounters = await getEncountersByPatient(selectedPatient.id);
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:        // The first one is the current one, so we need the second one for "Last Visit"
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:        // But wait, if they just started, the current one might be the only one.
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:        // We need the most recent COMPLETED or previous encounter.
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:        // Actually, let's just get the one that is NOT the current encounter_id if we have it.
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:        const currentEncounterId = selectedPatient.latest_encounter_id;
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:        const previousEncounters = encounters.filter(e => e.id !== currentEncounterId);
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:        
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:        if (previousEncounters.length > 0) {
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:          const last = previousEncounters[0];
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:          setLastVisit(last);
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:          const vitals = await getVitalsByEncounter(last.id);
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:          setLastVitals(vitals);
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:        } else {
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:          setLastVisit(null);
web/src/components/ClinicalSidebar.tsx:          setLastVitals(null);

web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:  const isAbnormalTemp = vitals.temperature && (vitals.temperature > 37.5 || vitals.temperature < 35.0);
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:  const isAbnormalHR = vitals.heartRate && (vitals.heartRate > 100 || vitals.heartRate < 60);
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:  const isAbnormalBP = vitals.systolic && vitals.diastolic && (vitals.systolic > 140 || vitals.diastolic > 90 || vitals.systolic < 90 || vitals.diastolic < 60);
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:  const isAbnormalO2 = vitals.oxygenSaturation && vitals.oxygenSaturation < 95;
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:  const getGlucoseStatus = (type: 'fbg' | 'rbg', val: number) => {
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:    if (type === 'fbg') {
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:      if (val >= 126) return { label: 'DIABETES RANGE', color: 'error.main' };
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:      if (val >= 100) return { label: 'PREDIABETES', color: 'warning.main' };
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:      return { label: 'NORMAL', color: 'success.main' };
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:    } else {
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:      if (val >= 200) return { label: 'CRITICAL ALERT', color: 'error.main' };
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:      if (val >= 140) return { label: 'ELEVATED', color: 'warning.main' };
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:      return { label: 'NORMAL', color: 'success.main' };
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:    }
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:  };
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:  const getHbStatus = (val: number) => {
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:    if (val < 7) return { label: 'SEVERE ANEMIA', color: 'error.main' };
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:    if (val < 11) return { label: 'MODERATE ANEMIA', color: 'warning.main' };
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:    if (val < 12) return { label: 'MILD ANEMIA', color: 'warning.main' };
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:    return { label: 'NORMAL', color: 'success.main' };
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:  };
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:  return (

web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:        STATION DATA SUMMARY

web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:
web/src/components/VitalsSnapshot.tsx:      {renderSection('Body Measures', [

web/src/components/NetworkStatusIndicator.tsx:
web/src/components/NetworkStatusIndicator.tsx:  if (isOnline && queueCount === 0) return null;

web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:import { useEffect } from 'react';
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:export function useFormAutoSave<T>(formKey: string, data: T, setData: (data: T) => void, enabled: boolean = true) {
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:  // Load data on initial mount
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:  useEffect(() => {
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:    if (!enabled) return;
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:    try {
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:      const saved = localStorage.getItem(formKey);
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:      if (saved) {
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:        const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:        setData(parsed);
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:      }
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:    } catch (e) {
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:      console.warn(`[AutoSave] Error restoring form data for ${formKey}:`, e);
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:    }
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:  }, []); // Only run once on mount
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:  // Save data when it changes
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:  useEffect(() => {
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:    if (!enabled) return;
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:      try {
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:        localStorage.setItem(formKey, JSON.stringify(data));
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:      } catch (e) {
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:        console.warn(`[AutoSave] Error saving form data for ${formKey}:`, e);
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:      }
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:    }, 2000); // 2s debounce
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:  }, [data, formKey, enabled]);
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:  const clearSavedData = () => {
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:    try {
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:      localStorage.removeItem(formKey);
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:    } catch (e) {
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:      console.warn(`[AutoSave] Error clearing form data for ${formKey}:`, e);
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:    }
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:  };
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:  return { clearSavedData };
web/src/hooks/useFormAutoSave.ts:}

web/src/hooks/useAuth.ts:export const useAuth = () => {

web/src/hooks/useAuth.ts:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
web/src/hooks/useAuth.ts:
web/src/hooks/useAuth.ts:  useEffect(() => {

web/src/hooks/useAuth.ts:      if (user) {

web/src/hooks/useAuth.ts:        // Fetch the user document from Firestore

web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:import { QueueItem } from '../types';
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:export const useQueueNotifier = (queueItems: any[]) => {
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:  const [newArrivalIds, setNewArrivalIds] = useState<string[]>([]);
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:  const prevQueueRef = useRef<Set<string>>(new Set());
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:  useEffect(() => {
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:    // Only track if we actually have items and it's not the initial load
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:    const currentIds = new Set(queueItems.map(item => (item.queueId || item.id)));
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:    const prevIds = prevQueueRef.current;
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:    
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:    if (prevIds.size > 0 && currentIds.size > 0) {
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:      const newlyAdded = queueItems
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:        .filter(item => !prevIds.has(item.queueId || item.id))
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:        .map(item => item.queueId || item.id);
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:      
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:      if (newlyAdded.length > 0) {
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:        // Play soft chime
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:        try {
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:           const ctx = new (window.AudioContext || (window as any).webkitAudioContext)();
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:           const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:           const gain = ctx.createGain();
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:           osc.connect(gain);
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:           gain.connect(ctx.destination);
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:           osc.type = 'sine';
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:           osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(880, ctx.currentTime); // A5
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:           osc.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(440, ctx.currentTime + 0.2);
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:           gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.1, ctx.currentTime);
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:           gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.01, ctx.currentTime + 0.2);
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:           osc.start();
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:           osc.stop(ctx.currentTime + 0.2);
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:        } catch (e) {
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:           console.warn("Audio Context not supported or allowed", e);
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:        }
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:        // Visually flash
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:        setNewArrivalIds(newlyAdded);
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:        const timer = setTimeout(() => setNewArrivalIds([]), 3000);
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:        return () => clearTimeout(timer);
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:      }
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:    }
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:    
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:    prevQueueRef.current = currentIds;
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:  }, [queueItems]);
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:
web/src/hooks/useQueueNotifier.ts:  return { newArrivalIds };

web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:export function useDraftSave<T>(storageKey: string, initialValue: T) {
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:  const [data, setData] = useState<T>(initialValue);
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:  const [isLoaded, setIsLoaded] = useState(false);
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:  useEffect(() => {
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:    async function loadDraft() {
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:      try {
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:        const draft = await localforage.getItem<T>(storageKey);
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:        if (draft) {
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:          setData(draft);
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:        }
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:      } catch (e) {
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:        console.error('Failed to load draft:', e);
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:      } finally {
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:        setIsLoaded(true);
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:      }
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:    }
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:    loadDraft();
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:  }, [storageKey]);
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:  useEffect(() => {
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:    if (!isLoaded) return;
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:    const saveTimer = setTimeout(() => {
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:      localforage.setItem(storageKey, data).catch(e => console.error('Failed to save draft:', e));
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:    }, 500); // 500ms debounce
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:    return () => clearTimeout(saveTimer);
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:  }, [data, isLoaded, storageKey]);
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:  const clearDraft = async () => {
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:    await localforage.removeItem(storageKey);
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:    setData(initialValue);
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:  };
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:
web/src/hooks/useDraftSave.ts:  return { data, setData, isLoaded, clearDraft };

web/src/services/queueService.ts:export const updateQueueStatus = async (queueId: string, status: EncounterStatus, isSaveProgress: boolean = false) => {

web/src/services/queueService.ts:        updated_at: serverTimestamp()
web/src/services/queueService.ts:      });

web/src/services/medicationSafetyService.ts:// Helper to estimate daily frequency from string (e.g., "3 times a day" -> 3)
web/src/services/medicationSafetyService.ts:const estimateDailyFrequency = (freqStr: string): number => {
web/src/services/medicationSafetyService.ts:  const lower = freqStr.toLowerCase();
web/src/services/medicationSafetyService.ts:  if (lower.includes('once') || lower.includes('1')) return 1;
web/src/services/medicationSafetyService.ts:  if (lower.includes('twice') || lower.includes('2')) return 2;
web/src/services/medicationSafetyService.ts:  if (lower.includes('thrice') || lower.includes('3')) return 3;
web/src/services/medicationSafetyService.ts:  if (lower.includes('4')) return 4;
web/src/services/medicationSafetyService.ts:  return 1; // default fallback

web/src/services/analyticsService.ts:    // Apply Equality Filters FIRST

web/src/services/analyticsService.ts:    }

web/src/services/analyticsService.ts:    const q = query(dailyRef, ...constraints);

web/src/services/analyticsService.ts:    // If empty, return generated preview data for demo purposes

web/src/services/analyticsService.ts:
web/src/services/analyticsService.ts:    return {

web/src/services/analyticsService.ts:      isPreview: false 
web/src/services/analyticsService.ts:    };
web/src/services/analyticsService.ts:  } catch (error) {

web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:export const processOfflineQueue = async () => {
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:  if (!navigator.onLine) return;
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:  const queue = await localforage.getItem<QueueItem[]>('haefa_retry_queue') || [];
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:  if (queue.length === 0) return;
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:  const remainingQueue: QueueItem[] = [];
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:  for (const item of queue) {
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:    try {
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:       const docRef = doc(db, item.collection, item.docId);
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:       if (item.action === 'set') {
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:         await setDoc(docRef, item.payload, { merge: true });
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:       } else {
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:         await updateDoc(docRef, item.payload);
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:       }
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:       console.error(`Failed to process queued item ${item.id}`, error);
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:       if (item.retryCount < 5) {
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:         // Exponential backoff logic would evaluate item.timestamp and retryCount here
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:         item.retryCount += 1;
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:         remainingQueue.push(item);
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:       } else {
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:         console.error(`Drop queued item ${item.id} after 5 retries`);
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:       }
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:    }
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:  }
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:  await localforage.setItem('haefa_retry_queue', remainingQueue);
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:};
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:// Start background loop

web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:  if (navigator.onLine) {
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:    processOfflineQueue();
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:  }
web/src/services/backgroundRetryQueue.ts:}, 10000); // Check every 10 seconds
web/src/utils/patient.ts:import { Patient } from '../types';
web/src/utils/patient.ts:
web/src/utils/patient.ts:export const calculateAgeYears = (p: Patient | undefined): number => {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  if (!p) return 0;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  let years: number | undefined;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  // 1. Try explicit age fields
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  if (p.age_years !== null && p.age_years !== undefined) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    // If age_years looks like a birth year, calculate age
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    if (p.age_years > 1900) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      years = new Date().getFullYear() - p.age_years;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    } else {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      years = p.age_years;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    }
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  } 
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  // 2. Fallback to DOB
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  else if (p.date_of_birth) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    const regex = /^(\d{2})\/(\d{2})\/(\d{4})$/;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    if (regex.test(p.date_of_birth)) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      const [_, day, month, year] = p.date_of_birth.match(regex)!;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      const birthDate = new Date(parseInt(year, 10), parseInt(month, 10) - 1, parseInt(day, 10));
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      const today = new Date();
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      years = today.getFullYear() - birthDate.getFullYear();
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      const m = today.getMonth() - birthDate.getMonth();
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      if (m < 0 || (m === 0 && today.getDate() < birthDate.getDate())) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:        years--;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      }
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    }
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  }
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  // 3. Fallback to estimated birth year
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  else if (p.estimated_birth_year) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    years = new Date().getFullYear() - p.estimated_birth_year;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  }
web/src/utils/patient.ts:
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  return years ?? 0;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:};
web/src/utils/patient.ts:
web/src/utils/patient.ts:/**
web/src/utils/patient.ts: * Calculates the age display string based on rules:
web/src/utils/patient.ts: * - If age >= 1 year: "[Years]Y"
web/src/utils/patient.ts: * - If age < 1 year: "[Months]M"
web/src/utils/patient.ts: * - If no data: ""
web/src/utils/patient.ts: */
web/src/utils/patient.ts:export const calculateAgeDisplay = (p: Patient | undefined): string => {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  if (!p) return '';
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  let years: number | undefined;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  let months: number | undefined;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  // 1. Try explicit age fields
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  if (p.age_years !== null && p.age_years !== undefined) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    // If age_years looks like a birth year, calculate age
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    if (p.age_years > 1900) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      years = new Date().getFullYear() - p.age_years;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    } else {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      years = p.age_years;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    }
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    months = p.age_months;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  } 
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  // 2. Fallback to DOB
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  else if (p.date_of_birth) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    const regex = /^(\d{2})\/(\d{2})\/(\d{4})$/;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    if (regex.test(p.date_of_birth)) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      const [_, day, month, year] = p.date_of_birth.match(regex)!;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      const birthDate = new Date(parseInt(year, 10), parseInt(month, 10) - 1, parseInt(day, 10));
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      const today = new Date();
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      years = today.getFullYear() - birthDate.getFullYear();
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      months = today.getMonth() - birthDate.getMonth();
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      if (months < 0 || (months === 0 && today.getDate() < birthDate.getDate())) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:        years--;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:        months += 12;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      }
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      if (today.getDate() < birthDate.getDate()) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:        months--;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:      }
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    }
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  }
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  // 3. Fallback to estimated birth year
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  else if (p.estimated_birth_year) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    years = new Date().getFullYear() - p.estimated_birth_year;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  }
web/src/utils/patient.ts:
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  // Final formatting
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  if (years === undefined || years === null) return '';
web/src/utils/patient.ts:
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  if (years >= 1) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    return `${years}Y`;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  } else if (months !== undefined && months !== null && months > 0) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    return `${months}M`;
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  } else if (years === 0) {
web/src/utils/patient.ts:    return months !== undefined && months !== null ? `${months}M` : '0Y';
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  }
web/src/utils/patient.ts:
web/src/utils/patient.ts:  return '';
web/src/utils/patient.ts:};

web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:export const seedICD11ToFirestore = async () => {
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:  try {
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:    let batch = writeBatch(db);

web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:    let totalSeeded = 0;

web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:            await batch.commit();
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:            totalSeeded += count;
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:            console.log(`Committed chunk of 500...`);
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:            batch = writeBatch(db);
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:            count = 0;
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:        }
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:    }
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:    if (count > 0) {
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:        await batch.commit();
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:        totalSeeded += count;
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:    }
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:    console.log(`Seeding complete! Successfully uploaded ${totalSeeded} records to 'icd11_common'.`);
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:    alert(`Seeding complete! Successfully uploaded ${totalSeeded} records.`);
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:  } catch (error) {
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:    console.error("Error seeding ICD-11 data: ", error);
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:    const errInfo: FirestoreErrorInfo = {
web/src/utils/seedICD11.ts:      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),

web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:export const calculateCVRisk = (inputs: CVRiskInputs): number | null => {
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  const { age, gender, isSmoker, bmi, sbp, hasDiabetes } = inputs;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (isNaN(age) || isNaN(bmi) || isNaN(sbp)) return null;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  // Determine Age Group
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  let ageGroup = '';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (age >= 40 && age <= 44) ageGroup = '40-44';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (age >= 45 && age <= 49) ageGroup = '45-49';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (age >= 50 && age <= 54) ageGroup = '50-54';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (age >= 55 && age <= 59) ageGroup = '55-59';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (age >= 60 && age <= 64) ageGroup = '60-64';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (age >= 65 && age <= 69) ageGroup = '65-69';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (age >= 70 && age <= 74) ageGroup = '70-74';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else return null;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  const smokingStatus: SmokingStatus = isSmoker ? 'Smoker' : 'Non-smoker';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  // Determine SBP Index
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  let sbpIndex = 0;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (sbp < 120) sbpIndex = 0;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (sbp < 140) sbpIndex = 1;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (sbp < 160) sbpIndex = 2;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (sbp < 180) sbpIndex = 3;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else sbpIndex = 4;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  // Determine BMI Index
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  let bmiIndex = 0;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (bmi < 20) bmiIndex = 0;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (bmi < 25) bmiIndex = 1;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (bmi < 30) bmiIndex = 2;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (bmi < 35) bmiIndex = 3;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else bmiIndex = 4;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  try {
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:    // If patient has diabetes, we use the lab-based chart with median cholesterol (4-4.9 mmol/L -> index 1)
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:    // as a refined proxy since non-lab Diabetic charts are effectively this in many WHO adaptations.
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:    if (hasDiabetes) {
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:      const diabetesKey = 1;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:      const labAgeGroup = getLabAgeGroup(age);
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:      if (!labAgeGroup) return null;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:      return riskDataLab[diabetesKey][labAgeGroup][gender][smokingStatus][sbpIndex][1];
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:    }
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:    
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:    return riskData[ageGroup][gender][smokingStatus][sbpIndex][bmiIndex];
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  } catch (e) {
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:    return null;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  }
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:};
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  age: number;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  gender: Gender;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  isSmoker: boolean;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  sbp: number;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  hasDiabetes: boolean;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  totalCholesterol: number; // in mg/dL
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:}
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:// WHO Laboratory-based risk chart for South Asia
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:// Data structure: [HasDiabetes][AgeGroup][Gender][SmokingStatus][SBP_Index][Chol_Index]
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:// HasDiabetes: 0:No, 1:Yes
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:// SBP_Index: 0:<120, 1:120-139, 2:140-159, 3:160-179, 4:>=180
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:// Chol_Index: 0:<4, 1:4-4.9, 2:5-5.9, 3:6-6.9, 4:>=7 (mmol/l)
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:const riskDataLab: Record<number, Record<string, Record<Gender, Record<SmokingStatus, number[][]>>>> = {
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  0: { // Without Diabetes
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:    '40-44': {
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:      'Men': {
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:        'Non-smoker': [[1, 2, 2, 2, 3], [2, 2, 3, 3, 4], [3, 3, 4, 4, 5], [4, 4, 5, 6, 7], [5, 6, 7, 8, 9]],
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:        'Smoker': [[3, 3, 4, 5, 6], [4, 4, 5, 6, 8], [5, 6, 7, 8, 10], [9, 10, 12, 15, 18], [13, 15, 18, 21, 24]]
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:      },

web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:// Interpolation for missing age groups in lab-based data
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:const getLabAgeGroup = (age: number): string => {
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (age >= 40 && age <= 44) return '40-44';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (age >= 45 && age <= 49) return '40-44'; // Use 40-44 as proxy or interpolate
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (age >= 50 && age <= 54) return '50-54';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (age >= 55 && age <= 59) return '50-54'; // Use 50-54 as proxy
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (age >= 60 && age <= 64) return '60-64';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (age >= 65 && age <= 69) return '60-64'; // Use 60-64 as proxy
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (age >= 70 && age <= 74) return '70-74';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  return '';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:};
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:export const calculateCVRiskLab = (inputs: CVRiskLabInputs): number | null => {
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  const { age, gender, isSmoker, sbp, hasDiabetes, totalCholesterol } = inputs;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (isNaN(age) || isNaN(sbp) || isNaN(totalCholesterol)) return null;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  const ageGroup = getLabAgeGroup(age);
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (!ageGroup) return null;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  const diabetesKey = hasDiabetes ? 1 : 0;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  const smokingStatus: SmokingStatus = isSmoker ? 'Smoker' : 'Non-smoker';
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  // Determine SBP Index
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  let sbpIndex = 0;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (sbp < 120) sbpIndex = 0;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (sbp < 140) sbpIndex = 1;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (sbp < 160) sbpIndex = 2;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (sbp < 180) sbpIndex = 3;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else sbpIndex = 4;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  // Determine Cholesterol Index (mmol/l)
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  // Conversion: mg/dL / 38.67 = mmol/L
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  const cholMmol = totalCholesterol / 38.67;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  let cholIndex = 0;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (cholMmol < 4) cholIndex = 0;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (cholMmol < 5) cholIndex = 1;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (cholMmol < 6) cholIndex = 2;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else if (cholMmol < 7) cholIndex = 3;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  else cholIndex = 4;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  try {
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:    return riskDataLab[diabetesKey][ageGroup][gender][smokingStatus][sbpIndex][cholIndex];
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  } catch (e) {
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:    return null;
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  }
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:};
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:export const getRiskLevel = (percentage: number) => {
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (percentage < 5) return { label: '<5%', color: '#84cc16' }; // Green
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (percentage < 10) return { label: '5% to <10%', color: '#facc15' }; // Yellow
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (percentage < 20) return { label: '10% to <20%', color: '#f97316' }; // Orange
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  if (percentage < 30) return { label: '20% to <30%', color: '#dc2626' }; // Red
web/src/utils/cvRisk.ts:  return { label: '>=30%', color: '#7f1d1d' }; // Maroon

web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:export const generateFatQrData = (patient: Patient, extra?: { bloodGroup?: string, allergies?: string[] }): string => {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  let age = 0;
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  if (patient.age_years) {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    age = patient.age_years;
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  } else if (patient.date_of_birth) {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    age = new Date().getFullYear() - new Date(patient.date_of_birth).getFullYear();
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  } else if (patient.estimated_birth_year) {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    age = new Date().getFullYear() - patient.estimated_birth_year;
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  }
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  const payload: any = {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    i: patient.id,
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    n: `${patient.family_name}, ${patient.given_name.charAt(0)}.`,
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    a: age,
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    g: patient.gender === 'male' ? 'M' : patient.gender === 'female' ? 'F' : 'O',
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  };
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  if (extra?.bloodGroup) {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    payload.bg = extra.bloodGroup;
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  }
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  if (extra?.allergies && extra.allergies.length > 0) {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    payload.al = extra.allergies.join(',').substring(0, 50); // limit length to keep QR clean
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  }
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  return JSON.stringify(payload);
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:};
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:export const parseFatQrData = (qrData: string): Partial<Patient> & { blood_group?: string; allergies?: string[] } | null => {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  try {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    if (qrData.startsWith('{')) {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:      const parsed = JSON.parse(qrData);
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:      
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:      if (parsed.i) {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:        return {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:          id: parsed.i,
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:          family_name: parsed.n ? parsed.n.split(',')[0].trim() : '',
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:          given_name: parsed.n ? parsed.n.split(',')[1]?.trim()?.replace('.', '') || '' : '',
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:          age_years: parsed.a,
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:          gender: parsed.g === 'M' ? 'male' : parsed.g === 'F' ? 'female' : 'other',
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:          blood_group: parsed.bg,
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:          allergies: parsed.al ? parsed.al.split(',') : undefined
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:        };
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:      }
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    } else if (qrData.startsWith('HAEFA-')) {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:       // Extract actual patient ID from older tokens? Wait, earlier we used `qrToken` which wasn't the ID. 
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:       // The `badge_tokens` resolved the `qrToken` to `patient_id`. We may still need to parse it if we can.
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:       // We can return the token here.
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:       return { id: qrData }; 
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    } else {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:        // Assume it's just an ID
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:        return { id: qrData };
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    }
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  } catch (e) {
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:    console.error("Failed to parse fat QR:", e);
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  }
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:  return null;
web/src/utils/qrUtils.ts:}
web/src/utils/triage.ts:import { Vitals, TriageLevel } from '../types';
web/src/utils/triage.ts:
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  triage_level: TriageLevel;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  priority_score: number;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  triage_reason: string;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  isCritical: boolean;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:}
web/src/utils/triage.ts:
web/src/utils/triage.ts:export const evaluateTriage = (vitals: Partial<Vitals>, age_years: number = 25, age_months: number = 0): TriageResult => {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  const reasons: string[] = [];
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  let isCritical = false;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  let urgentCount = 0;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  // SpO2 Checks
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  if (vitals.oxygenSaturation !== undefined) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    if (vitals.oxygenSaturation < 88) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      reasons.push(`SpO2 ${vitals.oxygenSaturation}% (Emergency)`);
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      isCritical = true;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    } else if (vitals.oxygenSaturation >= 88 && vitals.oxygenSaturation < 90) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      reasons.push(`SpO2 ${vitals.oxygenSaturation}% (Critical)`);
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      isCritical = true;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    } else if (vitals.oxygenSaturation >= 90 && vitals.oxygenSaturation <= 92) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      reasons.push(`SpO2 ${vitals.oxygenSaturation}% (Warning)`);
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      urgentCount++;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    }
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  }
web/src/utils/triage.ts:
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  // Heart Rate Checks (Age-based)
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  if (vitals.heartRate !== undefined) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    let hrLow = 60;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    let hrHigh = 100;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    let population = "Adult/Teen";
web/src/utils/triage.ts:
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    if (age_years === 0 && age_months === 0) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      hrLow = 100;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      hrHigh = 160;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      population = "Newborn";
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    } else if (age_years === 0 && age_months > 0) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      hrLow = 100;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      hrHigh = 150;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      population = "Infant";
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    } else if (age_years >= 1 && age_years <= 2) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      hrLow = 98;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      hrHigh = 140;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      population = "Child (1-2y)";
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    } else if (age_years >= 3 && age_years <= 5) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      hrLow = 80;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      hrHigh = 120;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      population = "Child (3-5y)";
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    } else if (age_years >= 6 && age_years <= 12) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      hrLow = 75;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      hrHigh = 110;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      population = "Child (6-12y)";
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    }
web/src/utils/triage.ts:
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    if (vitals.heartRate > hrHigh) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      reasons.push(`${population} Pulse ${vitals.heartRate} bpm (High)`);
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      urgentCount++;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    } else if (vitals.heartRate < hrLow) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      reasons.push(`${population} Pulse ${vitals.heartRate} bpm (Low)`);
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      urgentCount++;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    }
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  }
web/src/utils/triage.ts:
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  // Respiratory Rate Checks (Age-based)
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  if (vitals.respiratoryRate !== undefined) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    let rrLow = 12;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    let rrHigh = 20;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    let population = "Adult/Teen";
web/src/utils/triage.ts:
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    if (age_years < 1) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      rrLow = 30;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      rrHigh = 60;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      population = "Infant";
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    } else if (age_years >= 1 && age_years <= 12) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      rrLow = 18;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      rrHigh = 30;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      population = "Child";
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    }
web/src/utils/triage.ts:
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    if (vitals.respiratoryRate > rrHigh) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      reasons.push(`${population} RR ${vitals.respiratoryRate} bpm (High)`);
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      urgentCount++;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    } else if (vitals.respiratoryRate < rrLow) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      reasons.push(`${population} RR ${vitals.respiratoryRate} bpm (Low)`);
web/src/utils/triage.ts:      urgentCount++;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    }
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  }
web/src/utils/triage.ts:
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  // Temperature Checks
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  if (vitals.temperature && vitals.temperature >= 40) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    reasons.push(`Temperature ${vitals.temperature}°C (Critical)`);
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    isCritical = true;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  } else if (vitals.temperature && vitals.temperature >= 38.5) {
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    reasons.push(`Temperature ${vitals.temperature}°C`);
web/src/utils/triage.ts:    urgentCount++;
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  }
web/src/utils/triage.ts:
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  // Blood Pressure Checks
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  // Use second reading if available, otherwise first
web/src/utils/triage.ts:  const s = vitals.systolic_2 !== undefined ? vitals.systolic_2 : vitals.systolic;

web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:  // Smart Wait-Time Formatting: Shows hours if > 60 mins
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:  const formatWaitTime = (createdAt: any) => {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (!createdAt) return '0 min';
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    const totalMinutes = Math.floor((Date.now() - createdAt.toDate().getTime()) / 60000);
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (totalMinutes < 60) return `${totalMinutes} min`;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    const hours = Math.floor(totalMinutes / 60);
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    const mins = totalMinutes % 60;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    return `${hours} hr ${mins} min`;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:  };
