web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:  const getAgeYears = (p: any): number => {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (!p) return 0;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    let years: number | undefined;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (p.age_years !== null && p.age_years !== undefined) {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (p.age_years > 1900) years = new Date().getFullYear() - p.age_years;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      else years = p.age_years;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    } else if (p.date_of_birth) {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      const regex = /^(\d{2})\/(\d{2})\/(\d{4})$/;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (regex.test(p.date_of_birth)) {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        const [_, day, month, year] = p.date_of_birth.match(regex)!;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        const birthDate = new Date(parseInt(year, 10), parseInt(month, 10) - 1, parseInt(day, 10));
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        const today = new Date();
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        years = today.getFullYear() - birthDate.getFullYear();
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        const m = today.getMonth() - birthDate.getMonth();
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        if (m < 0 || (m === 0 && today.getDate() < birthDate.getDate())) years--;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      }
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    } else if (p.estimated_birth_year) {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      years = new Date().getFullYear() - p.estimated_birth_year;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    return years ?? 0;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:  };

web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:  const isPediatric = getAgeYears(selectedPatient) < 18;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:  const isUnderFive = getAgeYears(selectedPatient) < 5;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:  const getVitalStatus = (type: 'bp' | 'hr' | 'o2' | 'rr' | 'fbg' | 'rbg', val1: number, val2?: number) => {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (isNaN(val1)) return { color: '#e2e8f0', label: 'PENDING' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (type === 'bp') {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (isNaN(val1) || (val2 !== undefined && isNaN(val2))) return { color: '#e2e8f0', label: 'PENDING' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (val1 >= 180 || (val2 && val2 >= 120)) return { color: '#ef4444', label: 'CRITICAL' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (val1 >= 130 || (val2 && val2 >= 80)) return { color: '#f59e0b', label: 'WARNING' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      return { color: '#10b981', label: 'NORMAL' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (type === 'hr') {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      const age_years = getAgeYears(selectedPatient);
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      const age_months = selectedPatient?.age_months ?? 0;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      let hrLow = 60;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      let hrHigh = 100;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (age_years === 0 && age_months === 0) {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        hrLow = 100;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        hrHigh = 160;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      } else if (age_years === 0 && age_months > 0) {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        hrLow = 100;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        hrHigh = 150;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      } else if (age_years >= 1 && age_years <= 2) {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        hrLow = 98;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        hrHigh = 140;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      } else if (age_years >= 3 && age_years <= 5) {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        hrLow = 80;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        hrHigh = 120;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      } else if (age_years >= 6 && age_years <= 12) {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        hrLow = 75;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        hrHigh = 110;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      }
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (val1 > hrHigh || val1 < hrLow) return { color: '#ef4444', label: 'EMERGENCY' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (val1 > (hrHigh - 5) || val1 < (hrLow + 5)) return { color: '#f59e0b', label: 'URGENT' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      return { color: '#10b981', label: 'NORMAL' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (type === 'rr') {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      const age_years = getAgeYears(selectedPatient);
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      let rrLow = 12;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      let rrHigh = 20;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (age_years < 1) {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        rrLow = 30;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        rrHigh = 60;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      } else if (age_years <= 12) {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        rrLow = 18;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:        rrHigh = 30;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      }
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (val1 > rrHigh || val1 < rrLow) return { color: '#ef4444', label: 'EMERGENCY' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (val1 > (rrHigh - 2) || val1 < (rrLow + 2)) return { color: '#f59e0b', label: 'URGENT' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      return { color: '#10b981', label: 'NORMAL' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (type === 'o2') {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (val1 < 88) return { color: '#ef4444', label: 'EMERGENCY' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (val1 < 90) return { color: '#f43f5e', label: 'CRITICAL' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (val1 <= 92) return { color: '#f59e0b', label: 'WARNING' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      return { color: '#10b981', label: 'NORMAL' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (type === 'fbg') {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (val1 >= 126) return { color: '#ef4444', label: 'DIABETES RANGE' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (val1 >= 100) return { color: '#f59e0b', label: 'PREDIABETES' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      return { color: '#10b981', label: 'NORMAL' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (type === 'rbg') {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (val1 >= 200) return { color: '#ef4444', label: 'CRITICAL ALERT' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (val1 >= 140) return { color: '#f59e0b', label: 'ELEVATED' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      return { color: '#10b981', label: 'NORMAL' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    return { color: '#e2e8f0', label: '' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:  };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:  const getHbStatus = (hb: number) => {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (!hb || isNaN(hb)) return { color: '#e2e8f0', label: 'PENDING' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    const age_years = getAgeYears(selectedPatient);
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    const age_months = selectedPatient?.age_months ?? 0;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    const isMale = selectedPatient?.gender?.toLowerCase() === 'male';
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    const isPregnant = !!vitals.is_pregnant;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    let threshold = 12.0;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (age_years === 0 && age_months >= 1) threshold = 10.5;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    else if (age_years >= 1 && age_years <= 5) threshold = 11.0;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    else if (age_years >= 6 && age_years <= 11) threshold = 11.5;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    else if (age_years >= 12 && age_years <= 14) threshold = 12.0;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    else if (age_years >= 15) {
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      if (isPregnant) threshold = 11.0;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      else if (isMale) threshold = 13.0;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:      else threshold = 12.0;
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (hb >= threshold) return { color: '#10b981', label: 'NORMAL' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (hb >= 10) return { color: '#f59e0b', label: 'MILD ANEMIA' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    if (hb >= 7) return { color: '#f97316', label: 'MODERATE ANEMIA' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:    return { color: '#ef4444', label: 'SEVERE ANEMIA' };
web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:  };

web/src/screens/VitalsStation.tsx:  const handleCancelQueueItem = async (reason: string) => {

web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    const trimmed = value.trim();
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    if (!trimmed) return '';
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    const regex = /^(\d{2})\/(\d{2})\/(\d{4})$/;
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    if (!regex.test(trimmed)) return "Invalid format. Use DD/MM/YYYY.";
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    const [_, day, month, year] = trimmed.match(regex)!;
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    const d = parseInt(day, 10);
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    const m = parseInt(month, 10);
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    const y = parseInt(year, 10);
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    if (m < 1 || m > 12) return "Invalid month.";
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    const daysInMonth = new Date(y, m, 0).getDate();
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    if (d < 1 || d > daysInMonth) return "Invalid day.";
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    if (y < 1900 || y > new Date().getFullYear()) return "Invalid year.";
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    return '';
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:  }, []);
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:  const validateNID = useCallback((value: string) => {

web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    return /^(\d{10}|\d{13}|\d{17})$/.test(trimmed) ? '' : "Invalid NID (10, 13, or 17 digits).";
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:  }, []);

web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    return (patternA.test(trimmed) || patternB.test(trimmed)) ? '' : "Invalid MoHA format.";
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:  }, []);

web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:  const calculateIsMinor = (dob: string, birthYear: string | number) => {
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    let age: number | null = null;
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    if (dob && dob.length === 10) {
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:      const regex = /^(\d{2})\/(\d{2})\/(\d{4})$/;
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:      if (regex.test(dob)) {
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:        const [_, day, month, year] = dob.match(regex)!;
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:        const birthDate = new Date(parseInt(year, 10), parseInt(month, 10) - 1, parseInt(day, 10));
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:        const today = new Date();
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:        age = today.getFullYear() - birthDate.getFullYear();
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:        const m = today.getMonth() - birthDate.getMonth();
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:        if (m < 0 || (m === 0 && today.getDate() < birthDate.getDate())) {
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:          age--;
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:        }
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:      }
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    } else if (birthYear) {
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:      age = new Date().getFullYear() - Number(birthYear);
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    return age !== null && age < 18;
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:  };

web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:      return;

web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:      return;
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    if (activeStep === steps.length - 1) handleRegisterOrUpdate();
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:    else setActiveStep((prev) => prev + 1);
web/src/screens/RegistrationStation.tsx:  };

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    value, 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    field, 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    section, 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    type = 'text', 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    options, 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    placeholder,

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:  }: { 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    label: string, 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    value: string | null, 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    field: string, 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    section: 'cvRisk' | 'cvRiskLab', 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    type?: 'text' | 'select', 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    options?: { label: string, value: string }[],
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    placeholder?: string,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    helperText?: string
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:  }) => {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const isOverridden = data[section].overrides?.includes(field);
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const hasValue = value !== '' && value !== null && value !== undefined;
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    // Lock if it has a value AND hasn't been specifically marked for override
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const isLocked = hasValue && !isOverridden;
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    return (
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      <Grid size={12}>
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        <Stack direction="row" justifyContent="space-between" alignItems="center" sx={{ mb: 0.5 }}>
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:          <Typography variant="body2" sx={{ fontWeight: 'bold' }}>{label}</Typography>
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:          {hasValue && (
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:            <Tooltip title={isLocked ? "Override this pre-populated value" : "Restore original value"}>
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:              <IconButton 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:                size="small" 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:                onClick={() => {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:                  const currentOverrides = data[section].overrides || [];
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:                  const newOverrides = isLocked 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:                    ? [...currentOverrides, field] 
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:                    : currentOverrides.filter(f => f !== field);
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:                  onChange({ ...data, [section]: { ...data[section], overrides: newOverrides } });
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:                }}

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:                sx={{ p: 0.5 }}
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:              >
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:                {isOverridden ? <HistoryIcon sx={{ fontSize: 16 }} /> : <EditIcon sx={{ fontSize: 16 }} />}
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:              </IconButton>
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:            </Tooltip>
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:          )}
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        </Stack>
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        {type === 'text' ? (

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:            fullWidth

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:            onChange={(e) => {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:              handleStartSection(section);
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:              onChange({ ...data, [section]: { ...data[section], [field]: e.target.value }, sectionStatuses: { ...data.sectionStatuses, [section]: 'Complete' } });
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:            }}
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:            helperText={isLocked ? "Pre-populated from previous station" : helperText}
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:            FormHelperTextProps={{ sx: { fontStyle: 'italic', m: 0, mt: 0.5 } }}
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:            sx={{ '& .MuiOutlinedInput-root': { borderRadius: 1.5, bgcolor: isLocked ? '#f1f5f9' : '#fdfdfd' } }}

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        ) : (
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:          <FormControl fullWidth size="small" disabled={isLocked}>

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:              value={value || ''}

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:              sx={{ borderRadius: 1.5, bgcolor: isLocked ? '#f1f5f9' : '#fdfdfd' }}

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:  const handleNoToAll = (section: string, fields: string[]) => {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const updatedSection = { ...(data[section as keyof ClinicalAssessmentData] as any) };
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    fields.forEach(f => {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      if (section === 'patientHistory') {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        updatedSection[f] = { status: 'No' };
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      } else if (section === 'familyHistory') {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        updatedSection[f] = { status: 'No', records: [] };
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      } else {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        updatedSection[f] = 'No';
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      }
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    });
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      sectionStatuses: {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        ...data.sectionStatuses,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        [section]: 'Complete'
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      }
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    });
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:  };
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:  const isSuspectedTBActive = () => {

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const countYes = [lgerf, nightSweat, weightLoss].filter(v => v === 'Yes').length;
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    return cough === 'Yes' || countYes >= 2;
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:  };

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:  const handleRadioChange = (section: keyof ClinicalAssessmentData, field: string, value: string) => {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    handleStartSection(section as string);
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    if (section === 'patientHistory') {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      onChange({
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        ...data,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        patientHistory: {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:          ...data.patientHistory,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:          [field]: { ...data.patientHistory[field], status: value }
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        }
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      });
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    } else if (section === 'familyHistory') {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      const current = data.familyHistory[field] || { status: '', records: [] };
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      const newRecords = value === 'In The Past' && current.records.length === 0 ? [{ year: '', relation: '' }] : current.records;
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      onChange({
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        ...data,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        familyHistory: {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:          ...data.familyHistory,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:          [field]: { status: value, records: newRecords }
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        }
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      });
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    } else {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      onChange({
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        ...data,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        [section]: {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:          ...(data[section] as any),
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:          [field]: value
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        }
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      });
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:  };
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:  // CRA Auto-calculation
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    if (!isCRAEligible) return;
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    // 1. Non-Lab
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const nonLabSBP = parseFloat(data.cvRisk.sbp) || (typeof selectedPatient?.currentVitals?.systolic === 'number' ? selectedPatient.currentVitals.systolic : parseFloat(selectedPatient?.currentVitals?.systolic || ''));
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const nonLabBMI = parseFloat(data.cvRisk.bmi) || (typeof selectedPatient?.currentVitals?.bmi === 'number' ? selectedPatient.currentVitals.bmi : parseFloat(selectedPatient?.currentVitals?.bmi || ''));
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const inputs: CVRiskInputs = {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      age: parseInt(data.cvRisk.age) || patientAge,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      gender: (data.cvRisk.sex === 'Men' || data.cvRisk.sex === 'Women') ? (data.cvRisk.sex as Gender) : (selectedPatient?.gender === 'male' ? 'Men' : 'Women') as Gender,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      isSmoker: data.cvRisk.isSmoker === 'Yes',
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      bmi: isNaN(nonLabBMI) ? 0 : nonLabBMI,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      sbp: isNaN(nonLabSBP) ? 0 : nonLabSBP,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      hasDiabetes: data.cvRisk.diabetes === 'Yes',
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    };
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    // Only calculate if essential fields are present
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const canCalculateNonLab = !isNaN(inputs.age) && inputs.sbp > 0 && inputs.bmi > 0 && data.cvRisk.sex !== '' && data.cvRisk.isSmoker !== '' && data.cvRisk.diabetes !== '';
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const score = canCalculateNonLab ? calculateCVRisk(inputs) : null;
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    if (score !== data.cvRisk.riskScore) {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      onChange({
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        ...data,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        cvRisk: { ...data.cvRisk, riskScore: score }
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      });
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    // 2. Lab-Based
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const labSBP = parseFloat(data.cvRiskLab.sbp) || (typeof selectedPatient?.currentVitals?.systolic === 'number' ? selectedPatient.currentVitals.systolic : parseFloat(selectedPatient?.currentVitals?.systolic || ''));
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const labChol = parseFloat(data.cvRiskLab.totalCholesterol);
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const labInputs: CVRiskLabInputs = {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      age: parseInt(data.cvRiskLab.age) || patientAge,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      gender: (data.cvRiskLab.sex === 'Men' || data.cvRiskLab.sex === 'Women') ? (data.cvRiskLab.sex as Gender) : (selectedPatient?.gender === 'male' ? 'Men' : 'Women') as Gender,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      isSmoker: data.cvRiskLab.isSmoker === 'Yes',
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      sbp: isNaN(labSBP) ? 0 : labSBP,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      hasDiabetes: data.cvRiskLab.diabetes === 'Yes',
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      totalCholesterol: isNaN(labChol) ? 0 : labChol,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    };
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    // Requirement: All lab fields MUST be present including Cholesterol
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const canCalculateLab = !isNaN(labInputs.age) && labInputs.sbp > 0 && labInputs.totalCholesterol > 0 && data.cvRiskLab.sex !== '' && data.cvRiskLab.isSmoker !== '' && data.cvRiskLab.diabetes !== '';
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const labScore = canCalculateLab ? calculateCVRiskLab(labInputs) : null;
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    if (labScore !== data.cvRiskLab.riskScore) {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      onChange({
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        ...data,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        cvRiskLab: { ...data.cvRiskLab, riskScore: labScore }
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      });
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:  }, [data.cvRisk, data.cvRiskLab, isCRAEligible, patientAge, selectedPatient]);
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:  const renderSectionControls = (section: string, fields?: string[]) => (

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    };

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      patient_id: selectedItem.patient_id,
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      prescriptions: (consultData.prescriptions || []).map((p: any) => ({

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        status: 'Pending',

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        remainingQuantity: p.quantity || 0
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      }))
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    };
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    const finalPrescriptionData = sanitizeForFirestore(prescriptionPayload);
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    console.groupEnd();
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:    try {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      setIsFinalizing(true);
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      await saveConsultation(cleanPayload, finalPrescriptionData, !!options.isFinalize);
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      if (options.isFinalize) {

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      } else if (options.isComplete) {

web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:      } else {
web/src/screens/DoctorStation.tsx:        // Save Progress: Move back to READY_FOR_DOCTOR but preserve wait timer

web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:const AdvancedAnalytics: React.FC = () => {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  const navigate = useNavigate();
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  const { userProfile } = useAppStore();
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  const [syncing, setSyncing] = useState(false);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  const [summaries, setSummaries] = useState<DailySummary[]>([]);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  const [isPreview, setIsPreview] = useState(false);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  const [showInsights, setShowInsights] = useState(false);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  const [filters, setFilters] = useState<FilterState>({
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    dateRange: [null, null], // Default to last 30 days logic in service
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    countryId: 'all',
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    clinicId: 'all',
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    nationality: 'all',

web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  // Security Redirect (Must be after all hooks to avoid Rule of Hooks violation)
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    if (userProfile && !userProfile.isApproved) {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      navigate('/');
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  }, [userProfile, navigate]);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  // Derived statistics (Memoized for performance)
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  const aggregatedData = useMemo(() => {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    if (summaries.length === 0) return null;
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    // Flattening and aggregating across days
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    const totalPatients = summaries.reduce((acc, cur) => acc + (cur.total_patients || 0), 0);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    const newPatients = summaries.reduce((acc, cur) => acc + (cur.new_patients || 0), 0);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    // Merge disease prevalence
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    const diseaseMap: Record<string, number> = {};
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    const comorbidityMap: Record<string, any> = {};
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    summaries.forEach(s => {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      // Merge Disease Prevalence
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      Object.entries(s.disease_prevalence || {}).forEach(([code, count]) => {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:        diseaseMap[code] = (diseaseMap[code] || 0) + (count as number);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      });
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      // Merge Comorbidity Map
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      const sMap = (s as any).comorbidity_map || {};
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      for (const [major, majorData] of Object.entries(sMap)) {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:        if (!comorbidityMap[major]) comorbidityMap[major] = {};
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:        
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:        for (const [demographicSlice, minorsObj] of Object.entries((majorData as any))) {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:          if (!comorbidityMap[major][demographicSlice]) comorbidityMap[major][demographicSlice] = {};
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:          
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:          for (const [minor, count] of Object.entries((minorsObj as any))) {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:            comorbidityMap[major][demographicSlice][minor] = 
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:              (comorbidityMap[major][demographicSlice][minor] || 0) + (count as number);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:          }
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:        }
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      }
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    });
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    return {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      totalPatients,
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      newPatients,
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      diseaseMap,
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      comorbidityMap,
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      summaries // Pass through for charts
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    };
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  }, [summaries]);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  // Handle Load logic inside hook block
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  const loadData = async () => {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    setLoading(true);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    try {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      const response = await fetchDailySummaries(filters);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      setSummaries(response.data);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      setIsPreview(response.isPreview);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      setError(null);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      console.error("Aggregation Fetch Error:", err);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      setError("Failed to load analytics data. Ensure your connection is stable.");
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    } finally {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      setLoading(false);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  };
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    loadData();
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  }, [filters]);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  const handleSyncData = async () => {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    setSyncing(true);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    try {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      await triggerAggregation();
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      setTimeout(() => {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:        loadData();
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:        setSyncing(false);

web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    } catch (err) {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      console.error("Aggregation Trigger Error:", err);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:      setSyncing(false);
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  };
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  if (userProfile && !userProfile.isApproved) {
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:    return null; // Don't render until security check passes or redirects
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  }
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:  return (

web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:            </Button>

web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:            <Stack direction="row" spacing={2} alignItems="center">
web/src/screens/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx:              <InfoIcon sx={{ color: '#ea580c' }} />

web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:  // Formatting logic for clinical wait times
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:  const formatWaitTime = (createdAt: any) => {
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    if (!createdAt) return '0m';
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    const totalMinutes = Math.floor((Date.now() - createdAt.toDate().getTime()) / 60000);
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    if (totalMinutes < 60) return `${totalMinutes}m`;
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    const hours = Math.floor(totalMinutes / 60);
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    const mins = totalMinutes % 60;
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    return `${hours}h ${mins}m`;
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:  };
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:  const getTriageColor = (level: string) => {
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    switch(level?.toLowerCase()) {
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:      case 'emergency': return '#ef4444'; // Red
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:      case 'urgent': return '#f59e0b';    // Amber
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:      case 'standard': return '#10b981';  // Green
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:      default: return '#94a3b8';         
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    }
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:  };
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    if (!selectedCountry || !selectedClinic || !userProfile?.isApproved) return;
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    // Querying active queue - filtering status in memory to avoid composite index requirements
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    const q = query(collection(db, "queues_active"), 
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:              where("country_id", "==", selectedCountry.id), 
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:              where("clinic_id", "==", selectedClinic.id));
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:      try {
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        const allItems = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ 
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:          id: doc.id, 
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:          hasPendingWrites: doc.metadata.hasPendingWrites,
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:          ...doc.data() 
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        })) as QueueItem[];
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        // Filter status in memory
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        const items = allItems.filter(item => item.status !== 'COMPLETED');
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        // Sort by station entry time (or created_at if not available)
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        items.sort((a, b) => {
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:          const timeA = (a.station_entry_at?.toMillis() || a.created_at?.toMillis() || 0);
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:          const timeB = (b.station_entry_at?.toMillis() || b.created_at?.toMillis() || 0);
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:          return timeA - timeB;
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        });
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        setRawQueueItems(items);
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        setLoading(false);
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:      } catch (e) { setLoading(false); }
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    }, (error) => {
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.LIST, "queues_active");
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:      setLoading(false);
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    });
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    return () => unsubscribe();
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:  }, [selectedCountry, selectedClinic, userProfile?.isApproved]);
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:  // Background cache management for patient names/photos
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    const fetchMissingPatients = async () => {
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:      const missingIds = rawQueueItems.map(i => i.patient_id).filter(id => !patientsCache[id]);
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:      if (missingIds.length > 0) {
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        const newPatients = { ...patientsCache };
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        await Promise.all(missingIds.map(async id => { 
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:          const p = await getPatientById(id); if (p) newPatients[id] = p; 
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        }));
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:        setPatientsCache(newPatients);
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:      }
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    };
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:    fetchMissingPatients();
web/src/screens/QueueBoard.tsx:  }, [rawQueueItems]);
